blocks.text: Perfect! Let me create one more visualization showing RNA-ADT correlation:

input.code:
print("Computing RNA-ADT correlations...")

# Compute correlation between total RNA counts and total ADT counts per cell
rna_totals = np.asarray(rna.X.sum(axis=1)).flatten()
adt_totals = X_adt_for_plot.sum(axis=1)

# Create figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(12, 10))

# Plot 1: RNA depth vs ADT depth
ax = axes[0, 0]
scatter = ax.scatter(rna_totals, adt_totals, alpha=0.5, s=20, c=leiden_labels, cmap='tab20b')
ax.set_xlabel('Total RNA (counts)')
ax.set_ylabel('Total ADT (CLR signal)')
ax.set_title('RNA vs ADT Library Size')
corr_ra = np.corrcoef(rna_totals, adt_totals)[0, 1]
ax.text(0.05, 0.95, f'r = {corr_ra:.3f}', transform=ax.transAxes, 
        fontsize=11, verticalalignment='top', bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='wheat', alpha=0.8))

# Plot 2: RNA depth distribution by cell type
ax = axes[0, 1]
for cell_type in cell_types:
    mask = rna.obs['cell_type'] == cell_type
    ax.hist(rna_totals[mask], bins=30, alpha=0.6, label=cell_type)
ax.set_xlabel('Total RNA Counts')
ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')
ax.set_title('RNA Depth by Cell Type')
ax.legend()

# Plot 3: ADT depth distribution by cell type
ax = axes[1, 0]
for cell_type in cell_types:
    mask = rna.obs['cell_type'] == cell_type
    ax.hist(adt_totals[mask], bins=30, alpha=0.6, label=cell_type)
ax.set_xlabel('Total ADT (CLR signal)')
ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')
ax.set_title('ADT Depth by Cell Type')
ax.legend()

# Plot 4: Number of detected proteins per cell by cell type
ax = axes[1, 1]
protein_detection_threshold = -0.3  # CLR threshold for "detected"
proteins_detected = (X_adt_for_plot > protein_detection_threshold).sum(axis=1)

for cell_type in cell_types:
    mask = rna.obs['cell_type'] == cell_type
    ax.hist(proteins_detected[mask], bins=range(0, len(protein_names)+2), alpha=0.6, label=cell_type)
ax.set_xlabel(f'Number of Proteins Detected (CLR > {protein_detection_threshold})')
ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')
ax.set_title('Protein Detection by Cell Type')
ax.legend()

fig.suptitle('RNA-ADT Quality Control Metrics', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('rna_adt_qc_metrics.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
print("✓ QC metrics figure saved: rna_adt_qc_metrics.png")
plt.close()

print(f"\nRNA-ADT Correlation: r = {corr_ra:.4f}")
print(f"\nRNA depth (counts):")
print(f"  Mean: {rna_totals.mean():.1f}, Median: {np.median(rna_totals):.1f}, Std: {rna_totals.std():.1f}")
print(f"\nADT depth (CLR signal):")
print(f"  Mean: {adt_totals.mean():.3f}, Median: {np.median(adt_totals):.3f}, Std: {adt_totals.std():.3f}")
print(f"\nProtein detection rate (CLR > -0.3):")
print(f"  Mean: {proteins_detected.mean():.1f}/{len(protein_names)} proteins per cell")
